narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-FIN-11 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2024-54529. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1542, T1059, T1595, T1566. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CYB-01 has been observed in 5 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1555, T1059, T1195, T1547. Average risk score: 9.8/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-28 has been observed in 7 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-66376. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1021, T1476, T1078, T1059.001, T1555. Average risk score: 8.8/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 39 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-3888. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1542, T1059, T1566, T1199. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 8.6/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-09 has been observed in 7 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1530, T1486, T1555, T1059. Average risk score: 8.2/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.
Threat actor CDB-FIN-12 has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1555, T1566.002, T1595, T1566. Average risk score: 8.0/10.
Threat actor CDB-CN-01 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1071, T1595, T1059, T1195. Average risk score: 6.7/10.

Threat actor UNC-UNKNOWN has been observed in 152 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-36187, CVE-2026-4835, CVE-2026-33935, CVE-2026-33253, CVE-2026-1166. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1059.001, T1111, T1542, T1059. CRITICAL: 18 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 5.6/10.
Threat actor CDB-FIN-07 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1555, T1111, T1021.001, T1566. Average risk score: 5.6/10.

findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber) for key exchange

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE — quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto — quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
